TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Maypwan kyan bbnasan, khu pila ru tikuy pklahang hayan. thuyay ta musa mbaziy bbnasan ye'aya. blay ta musa khu pila smku pila, magan pila ru smatu tegami. atuni mhayan ta ga, blay ta musa kuysang ptayux hayan. kwara kinbalay knxan yuwaw na misu soni hani ga, pthuyay musa blay kinyanux ta.
S.PHON: majpwan kjan ββnas~ɕan, kħu pila ru tikuj pklaħaŋ ħajan. tħujaj ta mus~ɕa mβazij ββnas~ɕan jeʔaja. βlaj ta mus~ɕa kħu pila s~ɕmku pila, maɣan pila ru s~ɕmatu teɣami. atuni mħajan ta ɣa, βlaj ta mus~ɕa kujs~ɕaŋ ptajux ħajan. kwara kinβalaj knxan juwaw na mis~ɕu s~ɕoni ħani ɣa, ptħujaj mus~ɕa βlaj kinjanux ta.
S.FORM: Maypwan kyan bbnasan, khu pila ru tikuy pklahang hayan. thuyay ta musa mbaziy bbnasan ye'aya. blay ta musa khu pila smku pila, magan pila ru smatu tegami. atuni mhayan ta ga, blay ta musa kuysang ptayux hayan. kwara kinbalay knxan yuwaw na misu soni hani ga, pthuyay musa blay kinyanux ta.
S.PHON: majpwan kjan ββnas~ɕan, kħu pila ru tikuj pklaħaŋ ħajan. tħujaj ta mus~ɕa mβazij ββnas~ɕan jeʔaja. βlaj ta mus~ɕa kħu pila s~ɕmku pila, maɣan pila ru s~ɕmatu teɣami. atuni mħajan ta ɣa, βlaj ta mus~ɕa kujs~ɕaŋ ptajux ħajan. kwara kinβalaj knxan juwaw na mis~ɕu s~ɕoni ħani ɣa, ptħujaj mus~ɕa βlaj kinjanux ta.
